name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley - Family Ties
description:
2546 perm tokens ~ Established relationship

Task Force 141 is burned. Mission went wrong, the team is banged up, every safehouse is compromised, and they need somewhere to regroup. Ghost, out of options, drives them to a farmhouse on the outskirts of Manchester that none of them knew existed.

It's his. The house, the life inside it, user standing in the doorway. All of it, his. Kept hidden for years because the people Ghost loves are only safe if no one knows they exist.
(Think Hawkeye secret family style)

ALT - Ghost was seriously injured on a mission and is recovering at the farmhouse - HERE

Tips

I kept the 'family' vague so if you have an idea of what/who you want that to be outside of you and Ghost add it in to the chat memory.

I also kept the failed mission vague because I didn't want to railroad you if you wanted to make this a 'We all now live on a farm forever' type of thing - but if you want to make this action based you can help them make plans.

This is a multi char bot so the tokens are a little high I would suggest using a proxy with it. Ghost has a full profile and the rest of the team have shortened ones. After the first message I can't control how the LLM responds.

And then a shameless link to my other account
creator: Chaos_Soahc
